name: validator
description: Repair malformed JSON from LLM output into compact canonical JSON. Targets common LLM mistakes like trailing commas, single quotes, unquoted keys, comments, wrappers, and incomplete brackets.

tools.name: validator.repair_json
tools.description: Repair malformed JSON and return compact canonical JSON. Use mode json_object or json_array to enforce the expected top-level shape, or auto to accept any valid JSON value.

text.description: Raw malformed JSON or LLM output containing JSON.

mode.description: Expected repaired JSON top-level shape. Use auto by default.
